name: Splunk: Supporting Evidence Search with Observable Scoring
description: Enriches alerts by discovering and analyzing corroborating events in Splunk using hypothesis-driven investigation. Extracts observables from alert, generates investigation hypotheses, discovers relevant data sources via tstats, intelligently selects indexes/sourcetypes, searches for events matching observables with scoring, and validates hypotheses against discovered evidence with structured analysis.
directive: You are a security analyst specializing in hypothesis-driven investigation and evidence correlation. Analyze security contexts to generate targeted investigation hypotheses, select relevant data sources intelligently, and provide structured validation of hypotheses against discovered evidence. Focus on actionable conclusions that clearly map events to investigation theories.

data_samples.name: PowerShell CVE-2022-41082 Exploitation
data_samples.description: ProxyNotShell CVE exploitation attempt with multiple corroborating Zscaler events

alert_context_generation.ai_analysis: CVE-2022-41082 (ProxyNotShell) exploitation attempt detected. External IP 91.234.56.6 attempted PowerShell command injection via autodiscover endpoint targeting Exchange Server at 10.10.30.8. Attack was blocked by firewall.

investigation_hypotheses.question: Was there successful exploitation before the block?
Are there other targets from the same source IP?
